name: devmatch-visualcortex
description: DevMatch is a platform for developers and engineers to explore and connect with other developers. (frontend)
author: Rajesh Ranjan

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "🧩 VISUALCORTEX 🧩,🤖 BRAINBOX 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "cross-env PORT=1997 NODE_ENV=development next dev" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development CONCURRENTLY=true nodemon --quiet ../devmatch-brainbox/src/server.js"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "🧩 VISUALCORTEX  🧩,🤖 BRAINBOX 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "cross-env PORT=1997 NODE_ENV=production next start" "cross-env NODE_ENV=production node ../devmatch-brainbox/src/server.js"
